chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1958 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. None present for the petitioners nor intimation received. Record reflects that this petition was filed in the year 2019 and for once it was fixed in Court on 30.07.2019 when notices were ordered to be issued to the respondents as well as A.A.G. Sindh and DAG. However, then the petitioners chosen not to pursue their petition despite lapse of more than five years they did not attempt to fix the matter in Court for further proceedings; and, such conduct on the part of petitioners describe their lack of interest. Consequently, in such circumstances, the petition cannot be kept pending without any progress for an indefinite period, as such, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
